name: Side Saddle Bake House Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 9x13-inch cake pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together eggs, buttermilk, and both measures of melted margarine until well blended. Set aside.
4. Sift together sugar, flour, cornmeal, (both measures) baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Combine the sifted ingredients with the buttermilk mixture and stir just enough to combine the ingredients.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Makes 8 servings.
